prompt: Create an editorial hero image for 'Self-Healing Systems Need Governance'. Show a resilient system detecting and repairing faults inside a visible governance envelope with authority checks, escalation, rollback, observability, and human accountability. Use abstract SRE and systems-resiliency imagery, no product branding, and no implication of unrestricted autonomous remediation.
proof_boundaries: Do not imply capabilities of specific current products.
Do not claim quantified incident-duration or cost reductions.
Do not depict autonomous remediation as appropriate for every failure class.
